elements.name: User successfully add new absen point

steps.name: the user is on the login page
the user enters valid username and password
user click tambah absen point menu
user click field nama absen point
user input nama absen point "Kantor Pusat"
user input deskripsi absen point "Absen point untuk area lobby utama"
user should see the new absen point in the list
